```{r}
noms <- c("Ahmed", "Sara", "Khalid", "Fatima", "Omar")
```


```{r}
ages <- c(25, 30, 22, 40, 35)
```

```{r}
salaire <- c(30, 50, 25, 70, 60)
```

```{r}
plus_de_30_ans <- noms[ages > 30]
plus_de_30_ans
```

```{r}
salaire_sup_40k <- noms[salaire > 40]
salaire_sup_40k
```

```{r}
expensive <- noms[salaire > 45]
expensive
```

Exersice 3

```{r}
dépenses_mensuelles <- c(200, 300, 150, 400, 250)
```
